versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   kube-prometheus-stack-86-2-3    true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: kube-prometheus-stack
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: kube-prometheus-stack-86-2-3
      name: kube-prometheus-stack
      namespace: kube-prometheus-stack

examples.title: With Ingress
examples.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.8" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install kube-prometheus-stack oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=kube-prometheus-stack:84.2.1" \
  -n kcm-system
examples.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-8                  true
# kcm-system   kube-prometheus-stack-84-2-1    true
examples.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: kube-prometheus-stack
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: traefik-39-0-8
      name: traefik
      namespace: kube-prometheus-stack
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
    - template: kube-prometheus-stack-84-2-1
      name: kube-prometheus-stack
      namespace: kube-prometheus-stack
      values: |
        kube-prometheus-stack:
          prometheus:
            prometheusSpec:
              maximumStartupDurationSeconds: 300
            ingress:
              enabled: true
              hosts: ['prometheus.example.com']
          grafana:
            grafana.ini:
              auth.anonymous:
                enabled: true
                org_role: Viewer
              auth:
                disable_login_form: true
            # default login - admin:prom-operator
            ingress:
              enabled: true
              hosts: ['']
